v0_3_2_live_result.primary_exception: TypeError: read_json() takes 1 positional argument but 2 were given
v0_3_2_live_result.secondary_exception: PermissionError WinError 32 on raw_runtime.log during temporary-directory cleanup

root_causes.detail: A18.42 supervisor guessed a default-argument API not present in inherited A18.29 read_json(path).
Supervisor exception unwound before child process and raw log lifecycle were fully reconciled.
Instrumented miner froze every task before bulk submit. A blocking gate inside freeze could wait for REOPEN before any admitted task had been submitted, making drain impossible.

repair.read_json: safe_read_json compatibility wrapper and AST arity audit
repair.cleanup: stop/wait process tree, close log handle, copy retained runtime log, ignore only final temp cleanup errors
repair.scheduler: exact hash-bound replacement of bulk-freeze/bulk-submit with nonblocking defer and immediate submit per admitted task
repair.release: one live canary required before calibration; systemic errors abort after first slot

claim_limit: Offline validation cannot replace the operator's live Windows canary. Wave Pump remains unconfirmed.
